title: I Am Trying to Break Your Heart
original_title: I Am Trying to Break Your Heart: A Film About Wilco
overview: A documentary by photographer Sam Jones documenting American rock band Wilco recording their fourth album Yankee Hotel Foxtrot. Originally intended as a showcase of the band's creative process, the film crew catches unexpected complications between the band and its record label and problems among the band members themselves.
